title: Why Tadej Pogačar Raced Liège-Bastogne-Liège with a Black Armband
content:
Tadej Pogačar honors former teammate Cristian Muñoz with a black armband at Belgian monument after the Colombian’s death last week.

Read the full article at Why Tadej Pogačar Raced Liège-Bastogne-Liège with a Black Armband on Velo.
author: ahood
